description_long: This is a plush stuffed bear toy with a predominantly orange body and white accents on its snout, inner ears, belly, and feet. The white areas are decorated with small black polka dots, adding a playful texture to its appearance. The bear has large, round black eyes and a small black nose, giving it a friendly and approachable expression. Its limbs are rounded and slightly outstretched, and the ears are set high on the head, with the inner ear fabric matching the polka-dotted pattern. The stitching is visible along the seams, especially on the back and limbs, indicating a soft, fabric construction. The overall look is cuddly and inviting, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or neighborhood settings.
description: A soft, orange and white polka-dotted stuffed bear with large black eyes and a friendly face. Its plush body and rounded limbs make it appear cuddly and approachable.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, black eyes, nose, and the polka-dotted white belly and feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, rounded snout, and the polka-dotted side of the belly and feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and the full polka-dotted white back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the bear's profile, ear, and polka-dotted belly and feet.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round black eyes and a small, slightly smiling mouth. The features give the bear a gentle and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
